title: Java Text Blocks
summary: Java Text Blocks is a new feature in Java 13. I have updated the Java String tutorial to explain how the new Java text block feature works. A Java text block is also called a multi line String.
content: Java Text Blocks is a new feature in Java 13. I have updated the Java String tutorial to explain how the new Java text block feature works. A Java text block is also called a multi line String.
